concept: Imagine controlling a custodian of an interdimensional apartment complex housing beings from across the multiverse. Each resident requires specific environmental conditions—reverse gravity, accelerated time, impossible geometry—that must be maintained through a variety of maintenance systems. Address complaints and resolving conflicts between tenants whose natural laws fundamentally contradict each other. Your management skills will be tested during cosmic convergence events when dimensional boundaries temporarily dissolve, causing chaotic property-wide emergencies.
